root_causes.cause: Inline literals instead of Spacing.* tokens throughout the Today component family
root_causes.clears: Findings #1, #2, #3, #10, #12, #14, #17, #18, #20, #24 — all off-scale gap/padding/margin values in TodayHeroRing, TodayMealsSection, TodayMealsSection slot headers, SlotMacroChips, TodayActivityCard. The census-raw.md count of 875 off-scale instances traces to the same root: the Today family was written before the Spacing token rule was consistently enforced at write time. One pass through all components/today/ replacing every literal with the nearest Spacing.* token clears the bulk.
root_causes.fix: Programmatic replace: grep -rn 'gap: [0-9]\|padding[A-Za-z]*: [0-9]\|margin[A-Za-z]*: [0-9]' apps/mobile/components/today/ | filter off-scale values | replace with Spacing.* token. Run mobile:typecheck to confirm no breakage.

root_causes.cause: Literal hex colours inline in component style props instead of Colors.* or Accent.* tokens
root_causes.clears: Findings #4, #5, #19 (and the 188-instance hex census across the whole mobile codebase). Each literal is a token drift risk — any palette shift requires hunting component files instead of updating theme.ts.
root_causes.fix: For Today surface: replace '#EDEAF1' in TodayHeroRing:165 with Colors.light.ringTrack; '#EFEFEF' at :235 with a named token (Colors.light.backgroundSecondary is '#F6F5F2' — closest, or add a new 'pillTrack' semantic); '#E8E2EC' in TodayDashboardMacroTiles:110 with Colors.light.cardBorder. Full-surface fix uses the 188-instance grep list from census-raw.md.

root_causes.cause: Ad-hoc fontSize/lineHeight literals throughout TodayHeroRing instead of Type ramp references
root_causes.clears: Findings #6, #7, #8, #9 (GOAL/EATEN/OVER stat labels and values, StatusChip label, DisplayModeToggle segments) plus finding #25 (WeekView tooltip). All four components use bare fontSize integers that have no named ramp entry.
root_causes.fix: Add two named Type ramp entries to theme.ts: Type.overline (10px, 600, uppercase — for stat labels) and Type.small (11px, 500 — for pill/chip/segment labels). Replace all bare fontSize: 10/11/12/19 literals in the Today hero ring with the named steps. For the stat value fontSize: 19, either snap to Type.title (24) with a tighter lineHeight, or document a named 'statValue' step.

root_causes.cause: MacroColors.calories is a static constant (#3B2A4D) — it has no dark-mode variant. Components that use it for text colour work in light (11.86:1) but become near-invisible in dark (1.16–1.37:1). root_causes.cause: Off-scale spacing literals scattered across all recipe components — gap values of 4, 6, 10, 12, 14, 18, 28 appear in RecipeActionPills, RecipeMacroStrip, RecipeTitleBlock, RecipeIngredientGrid, RecipeMethodSteps, RecipeServingsFooter, and [id].tsx inline styles
root_causes.clears: Findings #16, #17, #18, #19, #20, #21, #22, #24 (8 spacing violations)
root_causes.fix: Replace every non-scale literal with the nearest Spacing.* token. Programmatic sweep: grep -rn 'gap:\s*[0-9]\+\|padding[^:]*:\s*[0-9]\+\|margin[^:]*:\s*[0-9]\+' apps/mobile/components/recipe/ then filter off-scale numbers. A single pass through all 7 recipe component files clears all 8 instances.

root_causes.cause: Off-scale borderRadius literals (16, 20, 24) appear in RecipeMacroStrip, RecipeServingsFooter, RecipeIngredientGrid, and [id].tsx card/sourceCard styles — all outside {4,6,8,12,9999}

root_causes.fix: Decide the canonical card radius: if 16 is intentionally a system-wide 'large card' value, add it as Radius.card = 16 in theme.ts and update all 5 sites. If not, snap to Radius.xl (12). Ingredient tiles that are pill-shaped use Radius.full (9999). Stepper circles use Radius.full.

root_causes.cause: Hardcoded colour literals in recipe components — '#3B2A4D', '#FFFFFF', 'rgba(255,255,255,0.94)', literal '#5E7C5A' / rgba(94,124,90,0.1) in RecipeDetailHero and RecipeTitleBlock — bypass the theme system and break dark-mode and future retheming

root_causes.cause: MacroColors.fat (#C9892C) and navPrimary dark (#815E91) fail or borderline-fail WCAG contrast thresholds in the macro strip (24px serif values). root_causes.cause: CARD_RADIUS = 24 exported from SupprCard.tsx violates the canonical 2026-05-22 Radius lock (max = Radius.xl = 12). All seven Progress tab top-level cards spread this constant.
root_causes.clears: Finding #1 (all Progress cards radius 24) — clearing this single constant fixes the most visually prominent and consistent violation across the entire Progress surface
root_causes.fix: Change `export const CARD_RADIUS = 24` to `export const CARD_RADIUS = Radius.xl` (12) in SupprCard.tsx:124. Visually re-verify all consumers — ~150 callers.

root_causes.cause: Off-scale spacing literals (6, 9, 10, 12, 14, 18) are used inline throughout progress.tsx, burn-detail.tsx, TrajectoryCard.tsx, and progress-metric.tsx — the Spacing scale is {4,8,16,20,24,32,40}. No 6/9/10/12/14/18. The census-raw.md total is 875 off-scale spacing instances across the app; the Progress surface cluster traces to inline style objects not using Spacing.* tokens.
root_causes.clears: Findings #2, #3, #4, #7, #8, #9, #10, #11, #19, #23, #24, #26, #27, #30 — the 14 spacing-scale violations across Progress, Burn Detail, TrajectoryCard and Metric Detail all share this root cause
root_causes.fix: Systematic pass: replace every literal 6→Spacing.xs(4) or Spacing.sm(8); 9→Spacing.sm(8); 10→Spacing.sm(8); 12→Spacing.md(16) or Spacing.sm(8); 14→Spacing.md(16); 18→Spacing.lg(20). The correct value depends on intent — do not round blindly; judge each use-site.

root_causes.cause: Off-scale borderRadius literals (2, 3, 3.5, 7, 10, 22) used in inline styles across TrajectoryCard, progress.tsx, burn-detail.tsx, progress-metric.tsx, and weekly-recap.tsx. The Radius scale is {4,6,8,12,9999}. Values of 2/3/3.5 appear on progress bars (should be Radius.sm=4); 7 on day dots (should be Radius.full=9999); 10 on badges (should be Radius.xl=12 or Radius.lg=8); 22 on icon circles (should be Radius.full=9999).
root_causes.clears: Findings #5, #6, #17, #20, #21, #23, #28, #29, #32 — nine radius violations share this root
root_causes.fix: Replace: `borderRadius: 3` → `Radius.sm` (4); `borderRadius: 3.5` → `Radius.full` (9999); `borderRadius: 7` → `Radius.full`; `borderRadius: 10` → `Radius.xl` (12); `borderRadius: 22` → `Radius.full`; `borderRadius: 2` (legend swatches) → `Radius.sm` (4); dynamic `size/3.5` in IconBox → `Radius.lg` (8).

root_causes.cause: Calorie over-target colour diverges between the Progress tab bar chart (uses `t.amber`) and the Progress Metric Detail screen (uses `t.red`). The calorie-ring 3-state mapping in the design contract specifies over-budget calorie = destructive red; amber is reserved for other over-budget signals (macros, sodium). The Progress tab was implemented with amber before the 3-state rule was locked.
root_causes.clears: Finding #27 (near-duplicate amber vs red across two surfaces showing same calorie data concept)
root_causes.fix: Change progress.tsx:1511 from `overTarget ? t.amber : t.green` to `overTarget ? t.red : t.green` to match the calorie-ring rule and the progress-metric screen. One line change.

root_causes.cause: Fractional type sizes (10.5, 12.5) in TrajectoryCard.tsx are not from the Type ramp. These produce anti-aliasing artefacts on non-retina contexts and create a near-duplicate with the legitimate 11pt and 12pt sizes already used adjacent to them.
root_causes.clears: Finding #31 (TrajectoryCard fractional font sizes)
root_causes.fix: Replace fontSize: 10.5 → 11 (or 10); fontSize: 12.5 → 12 or 13. Use `Type.label` / `Type.caption` style spread rather than inline fontSize.

root_causes.cause: Radius.xl * 2 = 24 pattern used as a 'super-card' radius across paywall components, import screens, and the success sheet — an undocumented radius value outside the locked {4,6,8,12,9999} scale, introduced when the SLOE DS reskin was applied
root_causes.clears: findings #7 (PaywallValueGrid/Comparison/PlanSelector), #13 (plan-import containers), #20 (import-shared panelCard/successSheet) — at minimum 8 component files
root_causes.fix: Remove the Radius.xl * 2 multiplication pattern across all files; replace with Radius.xl (12) as the canonical maximum card radius. If a distinct 'super-card' treatment is intentional, add a Radius.xxl = 16 token first, then reference it.

root_causes.cause: Off-scale spacing literals (6, 10, 12, 14) used throughout inline StyleSheet.create calls — these come from interactive component padding that pre-dates the Spacing token ramp or was written by eye rather than snapping to the scale
root_causes.clears: findings #3 (paywall trust chips), #4 (paywall promo input), #6 (PaywallPlanSelector), #9 (notifications CTA), #11 (notifications BulletRow), #15 (plan-import primaryBtn), #16 (plan-import callout), #18 (import-shared tabs), #22 (macro-detail header pill), #23 (macro-detail toggle), #24 (macro-detail slot header), #26 (meal-nutrition microRow), #27 (meal-nutrition slot items) — census-raw.md documents 875 total off-scale instances product-wide
root_causes.fix: Sweep all StyleSheet.create calls in the 8 files above using grep for literals not in {4,8,16,20,24,32,40}; replace each with the nearest Spacing.* token. A pre-commit lint rule (ENG-1002 — type ramp gate precedent) should enforce this at write time.

root_causes.cause: Raw '#fff' hex literals used for foreground text on filled CTAs instead of a semantic primaryForeground token — the paywall promo Apply button, notifications CTA, and import-shared CTA all use '#fff' while PaywallCta.tsx itself correctly uses Accent.primaryForeground
root_causes.clears: findings #8 (paywall promoApplyBtnText), #12 (notifications badge/button text), #20 (import-shared primaryBtnText)
root_causes.fix: Replace all color: '#fff' on CTA text with accent.primaryForeground (or Colors.white if the token is unavailable on that surface). Grepping for '"#fff"' in app/ directory will surface all 4+ instances.

root_causes.cause: The 'Not published' micronutrient row rendering logic shows all 35 curated rows including unpopulated ones — the populatedCount is computed but not used to collapse the unpublished rows
root_causes.clears: finding #25 (meal-nutrition 'Not published' wall of grey text)
root_causes.fix: In meal-nutrition.tsx around line 608, render only rows where row.value !== '—' by default, with an optional 'Show all fields' disclosure toggle. The sectionSub attribution line already correctly states 'X of 35 fields published by Y'.

root_causes.cause: Import screen family lacks a shared header primitive — import-shared.tsx implements a bespoke topBar while plan-import.tsx and cookbook-import.tsx use PushScreenHeader, producing a near-duplicate divergence across three sibling screens
root_causes.clears: finding #17 (import family header near-duplicate)
root_causes.fix: Migrate import-shared.tsx's custom topBar to PushScreenHeader with title='IMPORT' (or 'Import') and the back handler wired to goBack. The bespoke backText + topTitle styles can be deleted.

parity: Paywall CTA (PaywallCta.tsx) uses plain Pressable with no scale/haptic — the web pricing CTA uses hover/active states via Tailwind; the mobile equivalent is missing the equivalent interaction affordance entirely.

Import-shared header chrome: mobile uses a bespoke '‹ Back' + 'IMPORT' eyebrow layout; the web recipe import surface has a standard modal/drawer header — verify whether these resolve to the same visual language.

Meal-nutrition 'Not published' rows: web meal-nutrition dialog must be checked for the same collapsed-vs-expanded micro table treatment — if web collapses unpopulated rows and mobile does not, that is a parity gap.
